member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.DataType.#ctor
member.remarks: A default constructor is required for a serializable object.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.DataType.Clone
member.summary: Clones the structure of the object.
member.returns: A new object with the same structure as the current object.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.DataType.CompareTo(LJCDataTransformDAL.DataType)
member.returns: The integer that indicates the order relationship of the objects.
member.remarks:
A negative integer - This instance precedes the compare-to object.
Zero - This instance and the compare-to object have the same position.
A postive integer - This instance follows the compare-to object.

member.summary: Gets or sets the DataTypeID value.

member.returns: A reference to the matching item.

remarks.para: -- Library Level Remarks
Provides Data Access Layer (DAL) classes for the LJC.DataTransform programs.
The LJCDataTransformDAL library contains Data and Manager classes for presenting an object oriented view of the Data Transform database data.
The Manager classes use LJC.DataAccess to communicate with the database.
The DataTransformDAL library is part of the LJC.DataTransform solution.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.DataProcess.StatusName(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the ProcessStatus enum name from the enum value.

remarks.para:
if the TaskType is "Program" then the ActionItemName contains three parts separated with a forward slash. These parts are: AssemblyName, ClassName and MethodName. E.G. LJC.CommonModuleLib/CommonModule/CreateTable
The assembly namespace must be the same as the assembly name.
If the TaskType is "StoredProcedure" then the ActionItemName is the name of the stored procedure.

member.summary: Creates and adds the object from the supplied values.
member.returns: A reference to the added item.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskStatuses.LJCSearchName(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the collection element with name.
member.returns: A reference to the matching item.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskTransform.#ctor
member.remarks: A default constructor is required for a serializable object.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskTransform.Clone
member.summary: Clones the structure of the object.
member.returns: A new object with the same structure as the current object.

member.name: M:LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskTransform.CompareTo(LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskTransform)
member.returns: The integer that indicates the order relationship of the objects.
member.remarks:
A negative integer - This instance precedes the compare-to object.
Zero - This instance and the compare-to object have the same position.
A postive integer - This instance follows the compare-to object.

member.name: P:LJCDataTransformDAL.TaskTransform.TransformID
member.summary: Gets or sets the TransformID value.
